description: A security architecture specification document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/oob_security_spec.txt. Read the specification carefully. You need to configure OpManager's system-level HTTP Proxy settings to allow restricted outbound access and configure Primary and Secondary RADIUS Authentication for centralized identity management. Navigate to Settings > General Settings > Proxy Server Settings (or equivalent) for the proxy, and Settings > Authentication > RADIUS Authentication (or equivalent) for RADIUS. Implement all settings exactly as specified and save your changes. OpManager is running at http://localhost:8060 with credentials admin/Admin@123.
